headline: Does Verisk (VRSK) Index Shuffle Recast Its Role in Data-Driven Risk Management Portfolios?
summary: In late June 2026, Verisk Analytics was removed from several Russell growth benchmarks but added to the Russell 1000 Dynamic Index, reshaping its index footprint and potential passive fund exposure. Alongside these index changes, Verisk’s CargoNet business deepened its role in supply-chain risk management through a new cargo theft data integration with Trucker Path’s navigation platform. We’ll examine how Verisk’s removal from multiple Russell growth indexes might influence its investment...
